title: Product: Active Pipeline Review
summary: The team reviewed the active pipeline, discussing past engagement with Epilito Auto Group and updates on transcription and optimization fixes. Concerns were raised regarding pushing call notes to Drive Centric CRM, while issues with e-leads and VIN Solutions call note hyperlinks were addressed. Live production-level redaction for Frontline and automated call evaluations were highlighted as valuable features.

decisions.description: Follow up on the call note pushing capability for Drive Centric CRM integration.
Moved the portal link from the bottom to the top of the note within the VIN Solutions CRM to make it clickable.
Create a bot to scrape OEM call notes data directly from Dealer Socket CRM.
Notify the client success person when a dealer user without a portal login attempts to access the portal through a call note link.
Prioritize building an onboarding flow for new portal users.

actionItems.task: Look into the 30% API failure rate for notes not pushing.

expectedOutcome.description: Identify the root cause of the high API failure rate and implement a solution to reduce it.

actionItems.task: Test out the VIN Solutions API push notes in one store.

expectedOutcome.description: Verify that call notes are successfully pushed to VIN Solutions and the portal link is clickable.

actionItems.task: Continue working with Holly to get the list of users for system access review.

expectedOutcome.description: Obtain a complete list of users with system access for security review.

actionItems.task: Work on the onboarding flow for new people to the portal.

expectedOutcome.description: Implement a streamlined onboarding process for new portal users.

actionItems.task: Add call notes evaluation to Holly's CRM evaluation process.

expectedOutcome.description: Holly's evaluation checklist includes if the CRM is able to receive call notes from our system.

tensions: Concerns about the strength of the API connection for pushing call notes to dealers using Drive Centric CRM.
Doubt expressed by Shawna Behen regarding the reported 30% API failure rate for leads, feeling that such a high percentage of note failures would be noticed by her team.
Challenges with users adapting to AI LLM tools in the Frontline conserver pilot.
referencesToPast: Previous engagement with Epilito Auto Group and their interest in a hybrid model for outbound service.
Past issues with call notes refusal on Drive Centric CRM.
